description_long: This is a compact, single-story bungalow with a simple rectangular footprint and a flat roof. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with large glass sliding doors at the front and a set of windows along one side, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The structure features a green lawn or yard area adjacent to the main building, suggesting a private outdoor space. The interior layout is visible, showing a main living area, a kitchen, and a separate room, likely a bedroom. The design is modern and minimalistic, with clean lines and a focus on functionality. The absence of decorative elements and the use of large windows give it a contemporary, open feel.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, large glass doors, and an adjacent green yard. The design is minimalistic with prominent windows and a functional interior layout.
description_view_0: Front view showing large glass sliding doors, partial interior, and the green yard extending to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting a row of windows and the main entrance, with the green yard in front.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a solid wall with a central arch detail and glass doors, with the yard to the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a mostly solid wall with a single window and the green yard behind.
